calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change and Gender Change for a Minor Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioners William H. Naylor, father, and Angelica Hayde Guerrero Hernandez, mother of minor are present in court. The minor child, Alan Stevan Naylor Guerrero also appears in court.

Petitioners are sworn and examined.

Proof of Publication and Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Name Change to Alicia Alan Naylor Guerreroa nd Gender from male to female.

Decree changing Name and Gender signed by the court.
